content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit imported and `HMHomeManager()` instantiated in WallpaperGridView.swift:5, but the app is a wallpaper gallery with no home-automation UI or features (App/WallpaperGridView.swift:1-13).
Pierre: Apple requires HomeKit usage to correspond to genuine home-automation functionality; instantiating `HMHomeManager` in a wallpaper app with no accessories/rooms UI looks like an unrelated or vestigial import that could trigger a 4.5 rejection or at least reviewer questions, especially since it also likely requires a HomeKit usage description and entitlement with no justified purpose. Remove the unused HomeKit import/manager and any related entitlement, or if a future feature justifies it, add an actual home UI before submission.
